seoTitle: Numinbah Valley vs Nundah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Numinbah Valley and Nundah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Numinbah Valley vs Nundah: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Numinbah Valley and Nundah.
heading: Numinbah Valley vs Nundah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Numinbah Valley, Queensland and Nundah, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Numinbah Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Nundah (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Numinbah Valley or Nundah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Numinbah Valley has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Nundah scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Numinbah Valley scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Nundah scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Numinbah Valley or Nundah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Numinbah Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
